prose:
**Furan frontier-orbital analysis** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied (single-point, not optimized). SCF converged in 9 cycles; no warnings. **HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.2573602 eV**. Frontier orbitals: HOMO (−6.360 eV, index 17), LUMO (−0.102 eV, index 18). Koopmans' descriptors reported (IP = 6.360 eV, EA = 0.102 eV, hardness = 3.129 eV, softness = 0.320 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity = 1.668 eV). Total electronic energy = −230.114 Hartree. Command: `frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 furan.xyz`. Integrity: trustworthy (finite energy, converged SCF, valid schema).</prose>
<parameter name="n_atoms">9
